title: Vežba 151

questions.text:
Sarah je odlučila da pošalje e-mail i napiše njihov razgovor:

Hi Tom,

It was good talking with you earlier. I'm sending you this e-mail to summarize conversation. Hope this is helpful.

1. Visual Studio Code - live preview:

Make sure the live server extension is installed and running. If it's still not displaying, check your project settings and ensure that all files are correctly set up for real-time previews.

2. IntelliJ IDEA - Auto-Completion:

Double-check your project settings. If auto-completion isn't working, the project might not be set up right. Go to your project settings and verify that all necessary plugins are enabled.

3. Eclipse - Git Tools:

The Git tools are built-in, but they won't be visible unless your project is linked to Git. Make sure your project is connected to the Git repository.

Let me know if you need any more help, or if you'd like to go through a detailed walkthrough together.

Best, Sarah

Kaku vrstu pomoći Sarah daje Tomu u e-mailu?

answers.answer: Pomaže pri pokretanju projekta u njegovo/njezino ime.
answers.feedback: Zamisli da Sarah dodeljuje zadatak Tomu ili mu pomaže korak po korak.

answers.answer: Predlaže da Tom angažuje nekoga drugog da popravi probleme.
answers.feedback: Razmisli da li je glas Sare namenjen da joj pomogne ili da predlaže alternativno rešenje.
Proverite da li Sara se fokusira na pomoć sa postojećom konfiguracijom ili predlaže potpuno drugačije alate.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.
explanation:
Sara ne samo da daje korake za rešavanje problema, već pruža i više pomoći. Obrati pažnju na poslednji pasus gde kaže nakon, Let me know if you need any more help...

Ovo pokazuje da mu nudi pomoć Тому kroz detaljniju konfiguraciju ako je potrebno, umesto da radi u njegovo ime ili predlaže alternativno rešenje.
